title: IKE QUEST - 211info
text: ISAAC'S ROOM IKE QUEST Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on life skills, work training and experience, internships, mentoring, and enrichment by expanding horizons. Offers a place for youth to make connections and explore opportunities in the community. 299 Cottage Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Ages 16-21 Hours: Varies Email (503) 581-6154 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 581-6154 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Email to request an application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Application required AREA SERVED: Marion and Polk Counties SITE HOURS: 7 days per week 7am-7pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: 1 block east of the Cherriots transit mall Services: Life Skills Education Youth Employment Programs Youth Enrichment Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
